acceptance_criteria:
1. PromptWorld, PromptValue, JinjaPromptValue implemented in baml-bridge
2. Type-level #[render(...)] attributes working with compile-time validation
3. Field-level #[render(...)] overrides in Signature fields
4. CompiledSignature with boring templates replacing typed formatting
5. REPLHistory converted to new system as proof
6. #[format] removed with clear migration error
7. All tests passing, strict-only mode enforced
description: Complete overhaul of the prompt rendering system. Moves typed rendering from ad-hoc approaches to a principled PromptWorld/PromptValue architecture in baml-bridge. Strict-only mode, compile-time validation, type-level and field-level renderer attributes.
title: Render System Overhaul

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/examples/rlm_trajectory.rs] Create example with #[rlm_type] Trajectory/Step/Pattern types and TypedRlm::call() usage.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 6.2): add example with trajectory analysis (likely in `examples/` or update `main.rs`).
Demonstrate `TypedRlm::<Sig>::with_agent(...)` + `.call(...)`, then print `RlmResult` fields (iterations, llm_calls, constraint summary) and trajectory history.

title: Task 6.2: Create example with trajectory analysis
